title: vicia capreolata
intro: Vicia capreolata, also known as squirrel clover or bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Vicia capreolata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves, flowers, and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
